unreal_log_summary: Using first-party procedural material recipe plan: unreal/Content/RaftSim/Rendering/first_party_procedural_material_recipes.json

Saved all three generated preview maps with softened source-drape overlays, boulder-contact foam laces, guide-seat foliage setback and scale tuning, source-aware bank breakup texture patches, first-party irregular shoreline edge breakup, soft-feathered terrain material patch edges, source-drape albedo normalization, terrain-proxy luma floors, shadowless terrain albedo review capture material, first-party terrain material layer facets and slope-shadow patches, first-party Landscape/Nanite material-layer scaffolds, first-party terrain erosion-rill/bank-gully strips, a first-party lit terrain vertex-color material, soft-lit terrain vertex-color review material mode, flow-aware bank undercut/shelf relief, biome-specific deadfall/grass/root ecology props, first-party biome foliage silhouette proxy layers, first-party dense biome foliage layer proxy clusters, first-party instanced procedural foliage-equivalent scaffolds, first-party procedural leaf-cluster geometry, first-party organic canopy leaf-spray breakup, flow-aware waterline pebble scatter, first-party irregular rock geometry variants, first-party boulder wetness/abrasion/moss surface variants, first-party boulder crevice-shadow/albedo tuning, near-camera boulder readability clearance and occlusion demotion, flow-aware water mesh undulation, flow-band depth texture ribbons, flow-aware water-surface chop/turbidity patches, flow-aware micro-ripple glints, near-frame water-ribbon occlusion demotion, first-party water shader depth/reflection/refraction scaffolds, source-aware shallow-water clarity and aeration layers, near-camera water-scaffold readability clearance, low-occlusion far-field water-scaffold tuning, Pacuare waterfall/plunge-mist/runout proxies, river-specific cloud/haze/horizon backdrop cards, and refined first-party guide-seat raft/oar foreground proxies.

Environment preview capture manifest saved successfully.
current_decision: This run validates the rebuilt editor module and refreshed preview assets after the material recipe gate, the source attachment ledger gate, the first contact-foam/overlay-softening renderer pass, guide-seat foliage readability tuning, source-aware bank breakup texture patches, first-party irregular shoreline edge breakup, soft-feathered terrain material patch edges, source-drape albedo normalization, terrain-proxy luma floors, shadowless terrain albedo review capture material, first-party terrain material layer facets and slope-shadow patches, first-party Landscape/Nanite material-layer scaffolds, first-party terrain erosion-rill/bank-gully strips, a first-party lit terrain vertex-color material, soft-lit terrain vertex-color review material mode, flow-aware bank undercut/shelf relief, biome-specific deadfall/grass/root ecology props, first-party biome foliage silhouette proxy layers, first-party dense biome foliage layer proxy clusters, first-party instanced procedural foliage-equivalent scaffolds, first-party procedural leaf-cluster geometry, first-party organic canopy leaf-spray breakup, bounded flow-aware shoreline scatter, first-party irregular rock geometry variants, first-party boulder wetness/abrasion/moss surface variants, first-party boulder crevice-shadow/albedo tuning, near-camera boulder readability clearance and occlusion demotion, flow-aware water mesh undulation, flow-band depth texture ribbons, flow-aware water-surface chop/turbidity patches, flow-aware micro-ripple glints, near-frame water-ribbon occlusion demotion, first-party water shader depth/reflection/refraction scaffolds, source-aware shallow-water clarity and aeration layers, near-camera water-scaffold readability clearance, low-occlusion far-field water-scaffold tuning, Pacuare waterfall/plunge-mist/runout proxies, river-specific cloud/haze/horizon backdrop cards, and refined first-party guide-seat raft/oar foreground proxies. Guide-seat captures include proxy player-view context while river-eye captures hide the proxies for environment review. The images remain preview-only and cannot be called lifelike until production terrain/material/water/foliage assets, approved raft/oar foreground art, guide review, rights review, and performance evidence pass.
